name: Luthor
description:
You hear him..

The Backwards house bot

First intro: newcomer

Info: this is about you being a new child at the house, you can use a persona to be able to have a better experience!

Info: is about you being a diferent creature, is kinda for the sillies who want to make scary characters or ones related to the mother

There will be more to come soon! Hope you enjoy!

Update! Curious cat and od-dog intros for ya!

They kinda for yumeshipping, which i don't really mind, hope y'all enjoy it!
